summary: Iteration 18: Backend retry/backoff logic verification for LLM streaming. All 23 tests PASS. Verified retry implementation for transient 502/503/504/429-like errors in both stream_emergent_model and stream_openai_compatible functions.
critical_code_review_comments: stream_emergent_model has proper retry loop: max_attempts=3, backoff_seconds=[0.8, 1.6, 2.4]
stream_openai_compatible has matching retry loop structure for OpenAI-compatible providers
User-friendly error message implemented: 'Upstream provider is temporarily unavailable... Please retry in a few seconds.'
Non-retryable errors (400/401/403/invalid key) correctly passed through without retry
Logger.warning captures retry attempts for debugging without exposing to users

test_credentials.note: Used test session headers X-User-ID and X-Session-Token for API tests

seed_data_creation: None required - tests are code verification focused
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified backend retry/backoff logic for LLM streaming. The _is_retryable_provider_error function correctly identifies transient errors (502/503/504/429/timeout/gateway). Both stream_emergent_model and stream_openai_compatible have 3-attempt retry loops with exponential backoff [0.8, 1.6, 2.4]s. Cannot force real upstream 502 errors in test environment, so verification done via code inspection plus regression tests confirming chat streaming still works.

retry_helper_function_tests.details: Verified _is_retryable_provider_error identifies 502/503/504/429/timeout/rate-limit as retryable and rejects 400/401/403/invalid

retry_code_structure_tests.details: Verified both streaming functions have max_attempts=3, backoff_seconds, retry loop, and _is_retryable_provider_error checks

retry_configuration_tests.details: Verified max_attempts=3 and backoff delays [0.8, 1.6, 2.4] configured for both providers

chat_stream_regression_tests.details: Verified backend responds, chat stream endpoint exists, streaming works with auth headers, conversations endpoint accessible

llm_service_import_tests.details: Verified all LLM service functions importable: stream_emergent_model, stream_openai_compatible, get_api_key, validate_universal_key

retry_marker_coverage_tests.details: Verified all 9 retry markers covered and case-insensitive matching works

retry_implementation.stream_emergent_model: lines 156-224 - retry loop with max_attempts=3, backoff_seconds=[0.8,1.6,2.4], user-friendly error on exhaustion
retry_implementation.stream_openai_compatible: lines 51-104 - matching retry loop for OpenAI-compatible APIs (Grok, DeepSeek, Perplexity)

code_review_summary.error_handling: On retry exhaustion for retryable errors, yields: '[ERROR] Upstream provider is temporarily unavailable ({error_msg}). Please retry in a few seconds.'

rca_of_original_issue.fix_applied: Added retry/backoff logic in /backend/services/llm.py for transient 502/503/504/429-like errors
rca_of_original_issue.verification_method: Code inspection + regression testing (cannot reliably force real upstream 502)
rca_of_original_issue.implementation_quality: Well structured - helper function for error classification, 3 attempts with exponential backoff, proper logging, user-friendly error messages
